message:
feat(core): enhance validation with comprehensive skill checks

Add comprehensive skill validation logic for ensuring skill quality
and structural integrity.

src/core/validation.rs:
- Required field validation (title, description, content)
- Frontmatter schema verification
- Disclosure level consistency checks
- Dependency reference validation
- Token budget estimation
- Code block syntax validation
- Markdown structure verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
